stories.title: Big winners, losers and value picks of Round 1: Kiper on a wild start to the NFL draft
stories.summary: Mel Kiper Jr. makes sense of the first round of the NFL draft, sizing up moves like the Makai Lemon, Caleb Downs and Ty Simpson picks.

stories.title: Pick-by-pick takes on Round 1 of the NFL draft: How prospects fit with their new teams
stories.summary: Here's our NFL Nation reporters' look at the biggest questions for each Round 1 pick and how every player fits with his new team.

stories.title: Rams take Simpson, note 'this is Matthew's team'
stories.summary: The Rams selected quarterback Ty Simpson with the 13th pick in the NFL draft Thursday night, though coach Sean McVay made it clear: "This is Matthew's team."

stories.title: 'Ecstatic' Mendoza goes to Raiders with top pick
stories.summary: The Raiders made it official Thursday night at the NFL draft, taking former Indiana star QB Fernando Mendoza with the No. 1 pick.

stories.title: Amid Brown buzz, Eagles trade up for WR Lemon
stories.summary: The Eagles made a trade with the division rival Cowboys on Thursday night, selecting USC wide receiver Makai Lemon with the No. 20 pick.
